name: Grok 4 Heavy
archDisplay: Grok 4 base model served via parallel multi-agent test-time compute (reports describe 8-32 agents cross-checking answers)
note: Multi-agent 'Heavy' configuration of Grok 4, consumer-only via the $300/month SuperGrok Heavy tier; no public API model slug.
verificationNotes: Confirmed real: xAI shipped Grok 4 (incl. the Heavy multi-agent config, gated behind the $300/mo SuperGrok Heavy tier) on 2025-07-09, corroborated by x.ai and multiple independent outlets. All 5 result rows confirmed verbatim on their cited pages: HLE 44.4% appears literally on the Scientific American article ('That jumped to 44.4 percent with a version called Grok 4 Heavy'); GPQA 88.9%, AIME25 100.0%, LiveCodeBench 79.4%, and USAMO25 61.9% all appear literally in DataCamp's Grok 4 benchmark table. Confirmed via search that Grok 4 Heavy remains consumer-only (no API slug) and Grok 4 carries a 256K context window. paramsB/activeParamsB correctly left null — xAI has not disclosed them. Note xAI has since shipped newer Grok 4.3/4.20/4.5 variants, consistent with the 'deprecated' status.
